hard_stops.logic: appraisal report must be provided before any valuation review activities begin
target value was communicated to the appraiser — FIRREA and USPAP independence violation, appraisal is compromised

soft_flags.logic: appraisal value variance exceeds tenant's rebuttal threshold — rebuttal or second opinion may be warranted
comparable sale quality score is below 60 — comps may not adequately support the value conclusion
applied cap rate deviates more than 50 basis points from market consensus — justification should be reviewed
one or more standard valuation approaches (income, sales comparison, cost) are missing from the appraisal — USPAP completeness concern
